builderStatic.notes: On 2026-06-29 the remote-control audit re-verified CDP reconnect stability, window.app.builder, site.components, ui.propertiesPanel.showById, and current Builder action APIs for template 4155176224428477. See cardbuilder/docs/projects/main-template/REMOTE-CONTROL-AUDIT-2026-06-29.md.

templateInstance.notes: On 2026-07-13 the canonical Builder draft baseline was finalized after the MBX reinstall and anchor cleanup: fresh builder snapshot records 122 live Builder elements across 11 types with 18 embed elements, fresh tabs/dom/style scans were captured, the deterministic MCP target map was re-synced, cards was intentionally removed from the Builder draft, and the temporary why anchor was removed from container23. Live persistence proof was extended the same day: a temporary custom data-* probe on stable container18 survived Save -> Reload -> Readback and cleanup survived Publish -> Reload -> Published Readback; a temporary custom id probe on safe container28 also survived Publish -> Builder Readback -> Published HTML and its cleanup survived the same path. A real modal product attr probe then showed the current boundary more honestly: container12 kept data-modal-close-on-overlay=off in Builder after publish, but published mini.crd.co did not expose that attr on #data-modal-contact. Structural embed persistence is still not fully proven.

reason: Builder draft operational truth was refreshed and finalized after the 2026-07-13 MBX reinstall and id cleanup. Stable-container custom data-* persistence, safe custom id persistence, and cleanup publish flow were proven live, but a real modal product attr still failed to cross the full Builder-to-published boundary, so persistent canonical version still needs proof for additional mutation classes such as other product attrs, embed edits, and broader structural changes.
freshScanRequiredWhen: plugin sync or deterministic audit is requested and artifacts are incomplete
meaningful template or plugin changes happened after the latest full scan
